creator: marten.richter@freenet.de
text:
After updating p5-MARC-Record to Version 2.0, the ports losts the MARC lint functionalty since this is moved to a different package in CPAN namely MARC-lint. Therefore all programs relying on the lint.pm module are broken after the update to Version 2.0. Going back to an older Version of MARC-Report or creating a new port for p5-marc lint should solve the problem.

Fix: 

Switch to older upstream version or new port for the MARC-lint package
How-To-Repeat: See above.
